analysis.consistency: High. The damage scaling matches the general D&D 5e convention for damage increases per slot level above the base level.
analysis.quality: High. The description clearly defines the shape options (line or circle), dimensions, duration, concentration requirement, line of sight blocking, initial impact damage, and movement penalties/damage upon entry or ending a turn inside.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (a handful of thorns)
mechanics.primary_effect: Creates a physical barrier (wall or circle) that blocks line of sight.
mechanics.movement_penalty: 4 feet of movement spent for every 1 foot moved through the wall.

scaling.rule: Damage increases by 1d8 for both damage types for each slot level above 6th.

constraints: Requires a solid surface for placement.
